channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Washington Post Report Examines Alleged Influence of Science of Identity Foundation Leader on Tulsi Gabbard’s Political Career
item.description: A report published by The Washington Post alleges that former Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard may have received extensive guidance throughout much of her political career from Chris Bu...

item.title: Political tensions flare at Narok politician Harun Lempaka’s burial amid Kenya 2027 election rivalry
item.description: The burial of veteran Narok politician Harun Lempaka became a politically charged event as rival factions used the occasion to advance competing narratives about Kenya’s political future. What was int...

item.title: Off-duty police officer killed while praying inside a mosque in Lanao del Sur
item.description: An off-duty police officer was shot and killed while praying inside a mosque in Barangay Uyaan Proper, Madamba, Lanao del Sur on Saturday. According to Bangsamoro police spokesperson Capt. Steffie Sal...

item.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker Warns Trump After Escalating Remarks Amid Fragile U.S.-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly warned U.S. President Donald Trump after Trump reportedly made a series of aggressive statements regarding Iran and the Strait of Hormuz. A...

item.title: Prime Minister Says Tanzania’s Central Bank Gold Reserves Remain Secure and Have Not Been Sold by Private Individuals
item.description: Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has dismissed online rumours claiming that gold belonging to the Bank of Tanzania was secretly sold in a Middle Eastern country through the involvement of a private indi...

item.title: Sen. Chris Murphy Criticizes Presence of AI CEOs at G7 Summit and Calls for Stronger Oversight of Tech Companies
item.description: Sen. Chris Murphy of Connecticut expressed concern about the growing influence of major artificial intelligence companies after observing AI industry executives participating alongside world leaders d...

item.title: United Airlines Pilot Visits Boom Supersonic and Tests Overture Supersonic Airliner Simulator
item.description: A United Airlines pilot based in Minneapolis, known on YouTube as 'My Layover Life,' was given a behind-the-scenes tour of Boom Supersonic’s headquarters in Colorado during a work trip. The visit incl...

item.title: Peter Schiff Warns Federal Deficits Could Lead to Inflation if Government Relies on Monetary Expansion
item.description: Economist Peter Schiff, chief economist and global strategist at Euro Pacific Asset Management, warned that the United States government's growing budget deficit could eventually be financed through l...

item.title: Australian LNG producers discuss potential petroleum tax changes in exchange for softer gas reservation rules
item.description: Major Australian LNG producers and investors are reportedly exploring a significant policy compromise as they seek to influence the federal government's proposed domestic gas reservation scheme. Accor...

item.title: Report alleges Trump made threatening remarks toward Iranian negotiators during Fox News call amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: According to a Raw Story report, U.S. President Donald Trump allegedly made highly aggressive remarks toward Iranian peace negotiators during a phone call with Fox News correspondent Trey Yingst. The ...

item.title: Historian Ruth Ben-Ghiat Predicts Trump May Ultimately Make Concessions to China’s Xi Jinping
item.description: A political dispute emerged after historian and authoritarianism scholar Ruth Ben-Ghiat commented on President Donald Trump’s recent praise of Chinese President Xi Jinping. Her remarks were prompted b...

item.title: Criticism erupts over reported Trump phone call with Iranian officials and threats over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A report describing comments attributed to former U.S. President Donald Trump has sparked widespread political controversy after he allegedly recounted a phone call involving Iranian officials during ...

item.title: PPCRV seeks 30,000 volunteers to support 2026 Bangsamoro parliamentary elections
item.description: The Parish Pastoral Council for Responsible Voting (PPCRV), a Church-based election watchdog in the Philippines, is calling for around 30,000 volunteers to assist in the upcoming first-ever Bangsamoro...

item.title: Trump Reportedly Issues Threats and Escalatory Remarks in Call About Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: According to the article, U.S. President Donald Trump made a highly charged phone call with Fox News correspondent Trey Yingst that included a series of aggressive statements and threats related to ri...

item.title: Wanjigi urges economic sovereignty and youth-led accountability ahead of June 25 protests
item.description: Safina Party leader Jimi Wanjigi has called on Kenyans to unite in pushing for what he describes as economic sovereignty ahead of the planned June 25, 2026 memorial protests. Speaking on Sunday, June ...

item.title: Jane Russell’s Rise as a Hollywood Star and Cultural Icon During the 1950s
item.description: This article highlights the career and public image of actress Jane Russell during the 1950s, a decade in which she reached the height of her fame and established herself as one of Hollywood’s most re...

item.title: MAGA Supporters Criticize Reason Magazine Over Its Coverage of Tulsi Gabbard’s Biolab Claims
item.description: A dispute erupted within conservative and right-wing circles after libertarian magazine Reason published an article criticizing outgoing Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard and her recent ...

item.title: Expert Warns Lebanon Dispute Could Complicate U.S.-Iran Peace Negotiations
item.description: According to the article, U.S. and Iranian officials met in Switzerland to continue negotiations aimed at solidifying a tentative peace agreement between Washington and Tehran and bringing an end to t...

item.title: Jim Acosta Speculates About Possible Early End to Trump's Presidency During Interview With John Harwood
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on comments made by former CNN anchor Jim Acosta during an interview with journalist John Harwood published by Zeteo. In the discussion, Harwood asked Acosta whether he bel...

item.title: Nancy Mace Proposes Bill to Ban Federal Funding for Research Aimed at Altering Animal Biological Sex
item.description: Former U.S. Representative Nancy Mace of South Carolina announced plans to introduce legislation called the 'TRANS MICE Act,' which would prohibit federal funding for research intended to alter an ani...
